items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you like to study alone? I like study with y ou
• Do you like to eat? I like to speak with you
• 5- Do you play chess with your daughter every day?
• 7- Do you like to speak English with me?

items.text: Do you like to study alone? I like study with y ou
Do you like to eat? I like to speak with you
5- Do you play chess with your daughter every day?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Você gosta de comer? Eu gosto de falar com você
options: Do you like to drink? I like to speak with you
Do you like to eat? I like to speak with you
Do you like to eat? You like to speak with you
you with speak to like I eat? to like you Do

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Game – Jogo
Choose the English sentence for: New – Novo

items.answer: 7- Do you like to speak English with me?
